prompt: A cinematic anime-style movie poster featuring an anime girl with short blue hair, blue cat ears, and a fluffy blue cat tail, wearing an oversized white t-shirt. She is standing on a wet, reflective outdoor train station platform at twilight, looking back over her shoulder with a gentle, melancholic expression. The background features a beautifully detailed sky transitioning from deep blue to orange and pink, with scattered clouds and early stars. To the left is an illuminated vending machine and an overhead electronic sign displaying Japanese text about the terminal station. To the right, train tracks curve away into the distance alongside rusty metal railings and a convex mirror. The lighting is atmospheric and nostalgic. At the top center, small elegant Japanese text reads "終点のひとつ手前で、ソーダさんはいつも笑う。". At the bottom, large elegant Japanese typography displays the main title "終点からソーダさん", with the English subtitle "FROM THE TERMINAL, SODA-SAN" just below it. At the very bottom edge, small Japanese text reads "たぶん恋ではなく、もう少し炭酸だった。".
